stages.fallback_definition: Record import slots and scan available modules for references/trampolines.
stages.fallback_result: static slot-reference/trampoline fallback completed across available modules
stages.name: stage1_winsock_import_hook_baseline

stages.fallback_definition: Verify/inventory CrySystem and dynamic resolution evidence.
stages.fallback_result: startup-evidence fallback retained; no bootstrap claimed without call edge
stages.name: stage2_crysystem_inventory

stages.fallback_definition: Search offline modules for AegInitEngine evidence.
stages.fallback_result: ordinal/name/static-string fallback completed across installed and handover modules
stages.name: stage3_aeginit_argument_candidates

stages.fallback_definition: Extract only proven hook target or record blocker.
stages.fallback_result: no emulator/decoder generated because no concrete hook/transform was recovered
stages.name: stage4_hook_target_extraction
stages.primary_result: no proven hook target; exact blocker recorded

stages.fallback_result: exact blocker captured instead of claiming report-only success
stages.name: stage5_acceptance_gate
stages.primary_result: acceptance gate evaluated and report written
